arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala set to have €175m release clause inclu
arts.sum: Bild reports that Jamal Musiala is set to have a €175m release clause inserted into his Bayern Munich contract as negotiations over an extension continue. Bayern would like to reach…

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs. Wolfsburg (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be looking to win its third consecutive game to start the second half and fourth straight overall. A look at the rosters and injuries for Wolfsburg and Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund to go head-to-head for Lyon’s Rayan Cherki
arts.sum: According to Tobi Altschäffl and Christian Falk (via FT), Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund are both lining up a possible move for Olympique Lyonnais forward Rayan Cherki. As previously reported,…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich make contact with Borussia Dortmund’s English star
arts.sum: According to Bild, Bayern Munich are interested in signing Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens. It had previously been reported that Der Rekordmeister were targeting Chelsea’s Christopher Nkunku, having already agreed…

arts.ttl: Report: Jamal Musiala set to earn same salary as Harry Kane at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich is feeling good about its talks with star attacking midfielder Jamal Musiala. Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund was asked about the progress being made on a deal and the thought of having a release clause in the new contract.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich exec Max Eberl responds to Lothar Matthäus’ Joshua Kimmich contract advice
arts.sum: If all that was not enough, pundits and former club players are busy chirping in the media, too — including Lothar Matthäus, who has suggested that Bayern elevate Kimmich above Müller and current lead captain Neuer as a contract incentive. A bevy of Bayern Munich stars, from Joshua Kimmich to Leroy Sané to Alphonso Davies, are in the last six months of their contracts, meaning it is crunch time for negotiations.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich, Arsenal, Newcastle United competing for Ousmane Diomande; Napoli eyeing Mathys Tel; Real Madrid confident on Alphonso Davies pursuit; Carlo Ancelotti pleading for help?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich youngster Mathys Tel seems unlikely to skip town this month given the support he has received from the club both publicly and privately. Bavarian Podcast Works: Postgame Show — Bayern Munich 5-0 Hoffenheim (Bavarian Football Works)

arts.ttl: Tactics and attitude behind Bayern Munich’s dominant pressing style, says Eric Dier
arts.sum: Eric Dier's thoughts on the win over Hoffenheim: "A lovely evening. Opening up about the hunger in the squad to recover the ball immediately after losing it, Dier gave credit to the team’s preparation and attitude.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl lays out clear path to an extension for Leroy Sané
arts.sum: If he performs like he did against Hoffenheim, then he’s definitely a player who is an option for Bayern Munich.” But if you ask Max Eberl, Sané’s potential was on full display against Hoffenheim.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich is NOT interested in Manchester City’s Kyle Walker
arts.sum: Back in 2023, there was a somewhat brief craze surrounding a potential acquisition of Manchester City defender Kyle Walker by Bayern Munich . That might come as a relief to some Bayern Munich fans, who were not looking forward to a potential acquisition of Walker.
